heading: Appropriations for Library Building and Grounds
label: 143 Appropriations for Library Building and Grounds
text: All appropriations made to the Architect of the Capitol on account of the Library Building and Grounds shall be disbursed for that purpose in the same manner as other appropriations under his control.
notes: Transfer of FunctionsDisbursement functions of all Government agencies except Departments of the Army, Navy, and Air Force and Panama Canal transferred to Division of Disbursements, Treasury Department, by Ex. Ord. No. 6166, § 4, , and Ex. Ord. No. 6728, .June 10, 1933May 29, 1934Division subsequently consolidated with other agencies into Fiscal Service in Treasury Department by Reorg.
